rationale.R1.5: The output reorganizes the sections and provides a clear end-to-end plan with rationales for each section.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty is disclosed by noting invented values for certain metrics and suggesting future work to validate these assumptions.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift or additional scope.
rationale.RX.4: There are no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content introduced in the revised draft.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, including notes on invented values and assumptions.
